title: KPI Tasks Completed Per Week
excerpt: I’m trying to create a widget or dashboard to visualize the open and completed tasks of everyone in our organization for any given week. Does anyone have a suggestion for how to do this?

posts.author: JacksonBarry (Jackson Barry)
